features: 3 PACK: Pack of 3 x 2 Litre Hot Water Bottles, 3 Colours, Red, Yellow and Blue (you will receive one of each in the pack). Suitable for heating all parts of the body simultaneously, perfect companion for a chilly night or to soothe those annoying aches and pains. With a capacity of 2L, you are sure to stay snug and keep warm whilst in bed.
FAMILY SIZE: Suitable for heating several parts of the body simultaneously or for distrbuting amongst family members, Amazing Value Pack!

HIGHEST QUALITY STANDARDS: 2L Natural Rubber Hot water bottle which measures Approx 32 x 20cm with cover, K Collection Hot water bottles fully conform to British Standards BS1970 : 2012 and is free from any harmful substances.
ECO FRIENDLY AND COST EFFECTIVE: Save on your heating bills with our hot water bottles, they will warm you up in no time and can be used to assist in pain relief for cramps, aches and muscular pains
SHOP K COLLECTION: Complete your kitchen/bedroom/wardrobe with our other K Collection products - Coordinating products and accessories available.
description: Product description Pack of 3, Available in 2 Sizes 2L Hot Water Bottles and 800ml Mini Hot Water Bottles. Suitable for heating all parts of the body simultaneously, perfect companion for a chilly night or to soothe those annoying aches and pains. Indications Pain Relief, Muscle Aches, Menstrual Cramps
